GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM3+  GM3-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4+  GM4-  GM7  GM8  GM6  GM9  GM5+  GM5-  M1+  M1-  M3+  M3-  M2+  M2-  M4+  M4-  M6  M9  M7  M8  M5+  M5-  N1  N2  P5  P2  P4  P1  P3  P6  P7  X1+  X1-  X2+  X2-  X3+  X4-  X3-  X4+  X5  X6

4a (422,422) A1 2 1,4a (422,422) A2 2 1,4a (422,422) B1 2 1,4a (422,422) B2 2 1,4b (42m,42m) A1 2 1,4b (42m,42m) A2 2 1,4b (42m,42m) B1 2 1,4b (42m,42m) B2 2 1,4b (42m,42m) E1 4 0,4b (42m,42m) E2 4 0,4c (4/m,4/m) 1Eg 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) 1Eu 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) 2Eg 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) 2Eu 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) Ag 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) Au 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) Bg 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) Bu 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) 1E1g 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m) 1E1u 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 1E2g 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 1E2u 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 2E1g 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 2E1u 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 2E2g 2 1,4c (4/m,4/m). 2E2u 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) Ag 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) Au 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B1g 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B1u 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B2g 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B2u 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B3g 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) B3u 2 1,4d (mmm,mmm) Eg 4 0,4d (mmm,mmm) Eu 4 0,8e (2/m,2/m) Ag 4 1,8e (2/m,2/m) Au 4 1,8e (2/m,2/m) Bg 4 1,8e (2/m,2/m) Bu 4 1,8e (2/m,2/m) 1Eg 4 0,8e (2/m,2/m) 1Eu 4 0,8e (2/m,2/m) 2Eg 4 0,8e (2/m,2/m) 2Eu 4 0
